name: Darkmoon
description: Open source autonomous AI penetration testing platform where Markdown methodology agents orchestrate 80+ offensive security tools through MCP controlled execution with agentic reasoning, keeping an evidence trail per finding

name: h5i
description: CLI that runs several coding agents (Claude Code, Codex) on the same task, each in an isolated git worktree sandbox, has them peer-review each other, then a neutral verifier replays every candidate, runs the tests itself, and merges the one that passes

name: Cynative
description: Agentic security CLI that runs code in a built-in sandbox to research cloud, code and runtime

name: Reactive Agents
description: Type-safe, observable TypeScript AI agent framework on Effect-TS; MCP-native, A2A multi-agent, 6 reasoning strategies, runs the same code on local Ollama 4B+ and frontier APIs

name: AlphaAI
description: Financial news API and MCP server

name: Brave Search API
description: Independent web, news, image, video search and AI/LLM context API, suitable for RAG pipelines and AI agents
